allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c "set PATH=C:\\Program Files\\nodejs;%PATH% && C:\\Windows\\System32\\cmd.exe /c ""C:\\Program Files\\nodejs\\node.exe"" node_modules\\.bin\\next build 2>&1")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 3; Test-NetConnection -ComputerName localhost -Port 3001 | Select-Object TcpTestSucceeded")

Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 3001 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | ForEach-Object { Stop-Process -Id $_OwningProcess -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Write-Host ''Killed''")
Bash(powershell.exe -NoProfile -ExecutionPolicy Bypass -Command "Start-Sleep 4; netstat -ano | findstr :3001 | findstr LISTENING")
